metadata.description: Common European Framework of Reference for Languages standardization

cefr_scale.label: Beginner
cefr_scale.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions

cefr_scale.label: Elementary
cefr_scale.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions

cefr_scale.label: Intermediate
cefr_scale.description: Can produce simple connected text on familiar topics

cefr_scale.label: Upper Intermediate
cefr_scale.description: Can interact with fluency and spontaneity without much effort

cefr_scale.label: Advanced
cefr_scale.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without searching for words

cefr_scale.label: Proficient/Master
cefr_scale.description: Can use the language with complete spontaneity and precision

language_competencies.listening: Receptive Skill - Ability to understand spoken language
language_competencies.reading: Receptive Skill - Ability to understand written language
language_competencies.spoken_interaction: Productive Skill - Ability to engage in dialogue
language_competencies.spoken_production: Productive Skill - Ability to produce monologues
language_competencies.writing: Productive Skill - Ability to produce written text

competencies.description: Optional: Granular breakdown by competency type
